elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 2408: Servicing Mortgages Through
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Freddie Mac Gateway® and Other Servicing Tools
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2408.1: Mortgage relation to Chapters 2404, 2405, 2406
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Chapter 2408 addresses rights and obligations associated with the Servicing of Mortgages on
elements.label: text

elements.text: behalf of Freddie Mac by means of the Servicing Tools and is in addition to and not in limitation
elements.label: text

elements.text: of:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Chapters 2404, 2405 and 2406, which, along with Chapter 2401, address the licensing of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Servicing Tools; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Chapter 2407, which addresses the third-party licensing of Excluded Servicing Tools
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2408.2: Usage and integration of Servicing Tools and
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Excluded Servicing Tools (12/17/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Using Servicing Tools and Excluded Servicing Tools
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac Servicing Tools incorporated into the Guide
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Using Servicing Tools and Excluded Servicing Tools
elements.label: text

elements.text: This chapter sets forth special requirements associated with the use of Servicing Tools and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Excluded Servicing Tools for reporting loan-level information to Freddie Mac and
elements.label: text

elements.text: performing other Mortgage Servicing activities.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Defined terms
elements.label: text

elements.text: The following terms used in this chapter have the definitions assigned to them from
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 1401:
elements.label: text

elements.text: Terms used in this chapter
elements.label: text

elements.text: E
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Bulletin Chapter 2408
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Relating to technology having electrical, digital, magnetic,
elements.label: text

elements.text: wireless, optical, electromagnetic, or similar capabilities, as
elements.label: text

elements.text: defined in the “UETA” and/or “E-SIGN”
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Record A “Record” created, generated, sent, communicated,
elements.label: text

elements.text: received, or stored by “Electronic” means, as defined in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: “UETA” and/or “E-SIGN.” The term also includes a paper
elements.label: text

elements.text: document converted into an Electronic Record.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Signature An “Electronic” sound, symbol or process attached to, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: logically associated with, a contract or other “Record” and
elements.label: text

elements.text: executed or adopted by a person with the intent to sign the
elements.label: text

elements.text: “Record,” as defined in the “UETA” and/or “E-SIGN”
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Transaction An action or set of actions occurring between two or more
elements.label: text

elements.text: persons relating to the conduct of business, commercial, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: governmental affairs, using “Electronic” means, as defined
elements.label: text

elements.text: in the “UETA” and/or “E-SIGN”
elements.label: text

elements.text: R
elements.label: text

elements.text: Record Information that is inscribed on a tangible medium or that is
elements.label: text

elements.text: stored in an electronic or other medium and is retrievable in
elements.label: text

elements.text: perceivable form as defined in the “UETA” and/or “E￾SIGN.” A Record may be a paper or an “Electronic”
elements.label: text

elements.text: document.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Other provisions related to reporting requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer should refer to the following sections and chapters for information on
elements.label: text

elements.text: reporting requirements:
elements.label: text

elements.text: Other Guide provisions related to reporting requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: Guide provision Guide location
elements.label: text

elements.text: Default reporting requirements Sections 9102.6(a) and 9102.6(b)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages for which a Servicer is
elements.label: text

elements.text: pursuing an alternative to foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 9102.6(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Monthly loan-level exception and non￾exception activity reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapters 8301 and 8303
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii)Compliance obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Bulletin Chapter 2408
elements.label: text

elements.text: To service Mortgages using any and all of the Servicing Tools, the Servicer must comply
elements.label: text

elements.text: with:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The terms and conditions of Chapters 2401 through 2408 (including any third-party
elements.label: text

elements.text: terms and conditions referenced in Chapter 2407)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Other applicable Guide provisions, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Servicer’s other Purchase Documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Freddie Mac Servicing Tools incorporated into the guide
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicing Tools, including, without limitation, all visual content displayed on screens
elements.label: text

elements.text: and pages, system processes, system rules, terms and conditions, privacy policy, user guides
elements.label: text

elements.text: and instructions, are, by this reference, incorporated into and made a part of the Guide and
elements.label: text

elements.text: other Purchase Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2408.3: Compliance and legal framework (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Special representations and warranties, covenants, and agreements
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Amendments and updates
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Special representations and warranties, covenants, and agreements
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Compliance and commitments in Servicing Freddie Mac Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer represents and warrants to, covenants and agrees with Freddie Mac that the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer is in compliance with and will continue to comply with all of the requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: of this chapter, any other applicable Purchase Documents, system processes and rules,
elements.label: text

elements.text: terms of use, privacy policy, security standards and any user guides and instructions in
elements.label: text

elements.text: connection with Servicing Freddie Mac Mortgages using the Servicing Tools.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Controlled access to the Freddie Mac Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Freddie Mac Exclusionary List is made available to Servicers via Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Gateway®. Each time the Servicer accesses any Freddie Mac Servicing Tool, the Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: represents and warrants to Freddie Mac that Servicer has never:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Provided access to or otherwise made the Exclusionary List available to a Related
elements.label: text

elements.text: Third Party or any other party except as permitted under and in accordance with
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1201.8(a)(iii); or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Bulletin Chapter 2408
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Enabled or permitted any person or entity on the Exclusionary List to access or use
elements.label: text

elements.text: any Servicing Tool whether directly or indirectly through the Servicer or any Related
elements.label: text

elements.text: Third Party
elements.label: text

elements.text: Further, the Servicer covenants and agrees that it will not, under any circumstances, do so
elements.label: text

elements.text: in the future.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Amendments and updates
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer acknowledges and agrees that Freddie Mac may amend, revise and/or update
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicing Tools, this chapter and/or any other applicable Purchase Documents, and any
elements.label: text

elements.text: such amendment, revision and/or update will be effective as of the date specified by Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2408.4: Electronic Transactions management
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Electronic Transactions
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Access to copies of Electronic Transactions Records
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Electronic Transactions
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Consent to conduct Electronic Transactions
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer consents to conduct Electronic Transactions with Freddie Mac using the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Servicing Tools and Excluded Servicing Tools including, but not limited to,
elements.label: text

elements.text: using Electronic Records and Electronic Signatures in accordance with Chapter 1401.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer agrees that the Servicer’s employees may use Electronic Signatures, which
elements.label: text

elements.text: shall be the Servicer’s adopted and authorized Electronic Signatures, as defined in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1401.2(b), which also includes the process of using a computer mouse to “click
elements.label: text

elements.text: on” terms, words, items, images, numbers or buttons on screens in the Servicing Tools
elements.label: text

elements.text: and Excluded Servicing Tools.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Servicing Tools requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer acknowledges that Freddie Mac has provided the Servicer with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: minimum hardware, software, browser and other internet connectivity requirements the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer needs to conduct Electronic Transactions using the Servicing Tools.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Single-Family Seller/Servicer Bulletin Chapter 2408
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Access to copies of Electronic Transactions Records
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer acknowledges and agrees that the Servicer’s ongoing access to copies of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Records and Electronic Records related to any Electronic Transactions conducted by the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer in the Servicing Tools will be either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Paper copies printed by the Servicer; or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Electronic copies the Servicer is able to download or save to its computers
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer acknowledges that it is responsible for making or obtaining copies of such
elements.label: text

elements.text: Records and Electronic Records.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Servicer is unable to print, download or copy any of the Records or Electronic Records,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer may contact Freddie Mac for possible assistance.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 3101: Freddie Mac Exclusionary List and
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: FHFA Suspended Counterparty Program
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3101.1: Freddie Mac Exclusionary List (06/10/26)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Purpose and use of the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller/Servicer warranties regarding the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reporting and confidentiality obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Process for placement on the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Remedies
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Purpose and use of the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Purpose of the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac maintains the Freddie Mac Exclusionary List (“Exclusionary List”) to
elements.label: text

elements.text: protect the integrity of its Mortgage purchasing and Servicing functions. The names and
elements.label: text

elements.text: other identifying information of persons or entities whose conduct presents risks to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac, as determined by Freddie Mac in its sole discretion, may be placed on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List, in which case such persons or entities are prohibited from doing
elements.label: text

elements.text: business with Freddie Mac in any role described in Section 3101.1(a)(ii) below.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Use of the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must use the Exclusionary List only in accordance with the Guide,
elements.label: text

elements.text: including for the following purposes:
elements.label: text

elements.text: (A)Screen parties involved in the origination of the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: Before the sale of each Mortgage to Freddie Mac, the Seller must use the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List to determine whether, as of the Note Date, any person or entity
elements.label: text

elements.text: identified on the Exclusionary List—including through information such as names,
elements.label: text

elements.text: license numbers or other identifiers—performed any of the following roles in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: origination of the Mortgage or the underlying real estate transaction:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Borrower(s)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Property seller(s)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan Originator (e.g., loan officer)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan Origination Company (e.g., Third Party Originators, retail lenders,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage Brokers and Correspondents)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Real estate agent(s)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Real estate company(ies)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Settlement agent or the individual listed as the settlement agent on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Settlement/Closing Disclosure Statement
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Settlement company(ies)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Appraiser
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Appraisal company
elements.label: text

elements.text: If a party on the Exclusionary List performed any of these roles in the origination of a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage or the underlying real estate transaction, the Mortgage is not eligible for
elements.label: text

elements.text: sale to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (B) Screen parties involved in sales, quality control, loan production, processing,
elements.label: text

elements.text: underwriting or Servicing functions for Freddie Mac Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must use the Exclusionary List to confirm that none of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer’s own employees who engaged in any of the following functions
elements.label: text

elements.text: regarding Freddie Mac Mortgages are on the Exclusionary List:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Sales
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Quality control
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan production
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Processing
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Underwriting
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must use the Exclusionary List to confirm that no third-party
elements.label: text

elements.text: entity that performed any of the sales, quality control, loan production, processing,
elements.label: text

elements.text: underwriting or Servicing functions regarding Freddie Mac Mortgages is on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must screen its new employees and any third-party entity
elements.label: text

elements.text: involved in the aforementioned activities against the Exclusionary List at the time of
elements.label: text

elements.text: onboarding and at least once per year thereafter.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must confirm that any buyer of a short sale property is not on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Prohibited roles in sales functions include, without limitation, parties involved
elements.label: text

elements.text: in the delivery of Freddie Mac Mortgages. Prohibited roles in quality control
elements.label: text

elements.text: functions include, without limitation, parties involved in reviewing eligibility of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Mortgages and reporting adverse findings to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii)Access to the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Exclusionary List is updated at least monthly and is available to Seller/Servicers via
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Gateway®. The Seller/Servicer must use only the most current version of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List and must obtain an authorized ID and password to access the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers may obtain additional information on accessing the Exclusionary List by
elements.label: text

elements.text: calling Customer Service at 800-FREDDIE or contacting their Freddie Mac account
elements.label: text

elements.text: representative.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Seller/Servicer warranties regarding the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Seller warranties regarding the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: With respect to each Mortgage delivered to Freddie Mac, the Seller represents and
elements.label: text

elements.text: warrants that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ As of the Note Date, no person or entity on the Exclusionary List performed a role in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the origination of the Mortgage, the sale of the Mortgage to Freddie Mac or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: underlying real estate transaction (as set forth in Section 3101.1(a)(ii)(A), above)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ No person or entity on the Exclusionary List performed a role in the sales, quality
elements.label: text

elements.text: control, loan production, processing, underwriting or Servicing functions (as set forth
elements.label: text

elements.text: in Section 3101.1(a)(ii)(B), above) for the Mortgage at any time
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ It will maintain sufficient controls, and supporting documentation of such, to meet
elements.label: text

elements.text: these warranty obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Waiver of Seller warranties regarding the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: Before the Funding Date, the Seller may contact Freddie Mac to request review of a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage to obtain a waiver of the warranty requirements in Sections 3101.1(b)(i) and
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1301.5(c)(i)(8). The Seller should make such requests to Freddie Mac as set forth in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1301.5(c)(i).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii)Servicer warranties regarding the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: With respect to each Mortgage serviced on behalf of Freddie Mac, the Servicer represents
elements.label: text

elements.text: and warrants that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ No person or entity on the Exclusionary List will perform a role in any Servicing or
elements.label: text

elements.text: quality control functions relating to the Mortgage. This warranty applies to both the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer’s own employees and any third-party entity that performed any of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing or quality control functions regarding Freddie Mac Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The buyer of a short sale property is not on the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ It will maintain sufficient controls, and supporting documentation of such, to meet
elements.label: text

elements.text: these warranty obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Waiver of Servicer warranties regarding the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must contact Freddie Mac to request a written waiver before performing a
elements.label: text

elements.text: function or entering into a transaction that would violate the Servicer’s warranties set
elements.label: text

elements.text: forth in Section 3101.1(b)(iii).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer should make such request to the Freddie Mac Exclusionary List mailbox at
elements.label: text

elements.text: EList_Confirmation@FreddieMac.com.
elements.label: text

elements.text: As part of the request, the Servicer must inform Freddie Mac of the nature and extent of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the role played in the proposed transaction by the person or entity on the Exclusionary
elements.label: text

elements.text: List and provide other relevant information upon request. If Freddie Mac elects to grant
elements.label: text

elements.text: the waiver, Freddie Mac will provide to the Servicer written notice of such election, in
elements.label: text

elements.text: which case the warranty concerning the involvement of an excluded person or entity will
elements.label: text

elements.text: not be applicable to such transaction. All other requirements of the Purchase Documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: relating to the Servicing of the Mortgage will remain in full force and effect. Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac’s decision regarding the waiver of any warranties is within its sole discretion.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Reporting and confidentiality obligations
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Reporting obligations of the Seller/Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must immediately report the discovery of a possible breach of any
elements.label: text

elements.text: warranty in Section 3101.1 to the Freddie Mac Exclusionary List mailbox at
elements.label: text

elements.text: EList_Confirmation@FreddieMac.com.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Confidentiality and use of the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Exclusionary List and the identities of the persons and entities on the Exclusionary
elements.label: text

elements.text: List whose names are not publicly available are “Freddie Mac confidential information”
elements.label: text

elements.text: for the purposes of Section 1201.8.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer represents and warrants that it will keep the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: confidential in accordance with the terms and conditions of Section 1201.8. The
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer may use the Exclusionary List only for the purposes described in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3101.1(a)(ii) and must not use or disclose the Exclusionary List for any other purpose
elements.label: text

elements.text: without first obtaining Freddie Mac’s written permission. The Seller/Servicer will
elements.label: text

elements.text: indemnify Freddie Mac for any loss, damage, or expense resulting from the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer’s failure to maintain the confidentiality of the Exclusionary List or
elements.label: text

elements.text: information contained in the Exclusionary List.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Process for placement on the Exclusionary List
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will generally provide a person or entity with written notice of any proposed
elements.label: text

elements.text: placement on the Exclusionary List, along with an opportunity to submit a written response;
elements.label: text

elements.text: however, Freddie Mac may determine, in its sole discretion, that circumstances require
elements.label: text

elements.text: immediate placement of a person or entity on the Exclusionary List, without prior written
elements.label: text

elements.text: notice.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Grounds for placement on the Exclusionary List include, without limitation:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Fraud or possible fraud
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Misrepresentations, misstatements or omissions of facts
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Theft or misappropriation of funds
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Willful or reckless violation of statutory or regulatory requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Business practices that Freddie Mac determines present risks to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Lack of business controls to ensure the integrity of the Mortgages sold to or serviced for
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Evidence that demonstrates a lack of integrity or business competence
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any grounds that, in Freddie Mac’s judgment, may adversely affect Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac, in its sole discretion, will render a final decision regarding placement on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List after reviewing any response submitted by the proposed person or entity.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Remedies
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s remedies for a breach of the warranties, obligations or requirements of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer regarding the Exclusionary List include all remedies available to Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: under the Purchase Documents, including, without limitation, suspension or termination of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Seller or Servicer and repurchase of the Mortgage.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3101.2: FHFA Suspended Counterparty Program
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Avoiding employing Named Parties
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Selling or Servicing Mortgages involving Named Parties
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Responsibility to review FHFA’s SCP list
elements.label: text

elements.text: FHFA maintains a Suspended Counterparty Program (SCP) and requires Freddie Mac to refrain
elements.label: text

elements.text: from and/or cease conducting business with individuals and entities listed on FHFA’s SCP list
elements.label: text

elements.text: (“Named Parties”), subject to any conditions or exclusions in the applicable Named Party’s final
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspension order.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Avoiding employing Named Parties
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must establish and maintain procedures to ensure Seller/Servicers do not
elements.label: text

elements.text: employ or contract with Named Parties for any purpose directly related to the origination,
elements.label: text

elements.text: underwriting, or Servicing of a Freddie Mac Mortgage, subject to any conditions or
elements.label: text

elements.text: exclusions in the applicable SCP Named Party’s final suspension order.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Selling or Servicing Mortgages involving Named Parties
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller must not sell to Freddie Mac, and the Servicer must not engage in any Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: activity in connection with, any Mortgage in which a Named Party is a necessary signatory
elements.label: text

elements.text: on the Note, Security Instrument, modification agreement, deed of sale (e.g., short sale, third￾party sale, etc.) or other contract related to such Mortgage, subject to any conditions or
elements.label: text

elements.text: exclusions in the applicable Named Party’s final suspension order.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Responsibility to review FHFA’s SCP list
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers are responsible for reviewing FHFA’s SCP list and related final suspension
elements.label: text

elements.text: orders, which can be found on FHFA’s website at
elements.label: text

elements.text: http://www.fhfa.gov/SupervisionRegulation/LegalDocuments/Pages/SuspendedCounter
elements.label: text

elements.text: partyProgram.aspx.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 3201: Fraud Prevention, Detection and
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Reporting; Reporting Other Suspicious Activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3201.1: Fraud prevention and detection measures
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must have in place comprehensive practices and procedures to prevent and
elements.label: text

elements.text: detect fraud throughout each stage of the origination and Servicing of a Mortgage and in related
elements.label: text

elements.text: real estate transactions.
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section identifies fraud prevention and detection requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Employee hiring and training
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Origination and Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seller/Servicer’s in-house quality control program
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Additional fraud mitigation resources
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must implement additional practices and procedures, as deemed necessary, to
elements.label: text

elements.text: ensure that an effective fraud prevention and detection plan is in place.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Employee hiring and training
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must have screening and hiring practices in place to ensure the integrity
elements.label: text

elements.text: of its employees. Employees and any entity or individual engaged to handle or perform
elements.label: text

elements.text: functions typically handled by employees, and in a position to notice or report fraud and
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspected fraud, must receive training in each applicable area of the Seller/Servicer’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: mortgage business about:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Common and emerging fraud schemes
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Red flags that may signal fraud and the need for more review
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must communicate its procedures (including requirements of this
elements.label: text

elements.text: chapter) for prevention, detection and reporting of fraud and suspected fraud to its employees
elements.label: text

elements.text: and the entities and individuals referenced above.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Parties engaged to handle or perform functions typically performed by employees and in a
elements.label: text

elements.text: position to notice or report fraud or suspected fraud may include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Contract underwriters
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Contract processing services (including loan processors)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Contract quality control firms
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Borrower outreach companies
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loss mitigation services
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Collection companies
elements.label: text

elements.text: The training must include periodic updates at least annually to ensure employees and parties
elements.label: text

elements.text: referenced above are aware of emerging fraud scenarios.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must either provide the training directly, hire a third party to provide the
elements.label: text

elements.text: training, or obtain an annual written verification from the engaged entity or individual
elements.label: text

elements.text: confirming that training has already been received from another party in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of this section.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Origination and Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must take the following minimum steps to prevent and detect fraud in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: areas of origination and Servicing:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Escalate internally and properly investigate information received from any source that
elements.label: text

elements.text: indicates suspected fraud. Sources can include:
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Borrowers
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Participants in the Mortgage transaction
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Participants in the related real estate transactions
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Servicing functions relating to a Mortgage or REO property
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Loss mitigation activities or transactions, such as:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Forbearance plans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan modifications
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Foreclosures
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Deeds-in-lieu of foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Short sales of the underlying property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Investigate unusual patterns or discrepancies or other red flags, such as first and early￾payment defaults
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Comply with Section 3101.1 regarding screening through the Freddie Mac Exclusionary
elements.label: text

elements.text: List
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Comply with all other Guide provisions relating to fraud prevention and detection
elements.label: text

elements.text: Red flags identified in origination and/or Servicing may include, but are not limited to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Origination:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Collateral, appraisal and property fraud (e.g., flipping, flopping, over or under
elements.label: text

elements.text: valuation, property condition)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Misrepresentations (e.g., assets, liabilities/debt, occupancy, strawbuyer, employment,
elements.label: text

elements.text: income)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Identity theft
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Irregularities in the loan application or Mortgage documentation (e.g., false
elements.label: text

elements.text: documents, forgeries, excessive gift funds)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Servicing:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Potentially suspicious payment activity (e.g., structured cash payments, payments
elements.label: text

elements.text: returned due to fraud, curtailments or large payments with unknown source of funds,
elements.label: text

elements.text: payment kiting)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Loan modification and foreclosure fraud (e.g., loan modification rescue schemes,
elements.label: text

elements.text: misrepresentation of eligibility requirements)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Debt elimination schemes (e.g., false identity theft claims, sovereign citizen fraud)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Potentially suspicious or fraudulent payoffs (e.g., early payoffs, potentially suspicious
elements.label: text

elements.text: or fraudulent wires, diversion of funds)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must know the parties with whom they do business.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Sellers must approve, evaluate and monitor Mortgage Brokers, Correspondents,
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage Service Providers, appraisers, and property data collectors
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Servicers must approve, evaluate and monitor appraisers and any third party to whom
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing functions relating to a Mortgage or REO property are outsourced or assigned,
elements.label: text

elements.text: including, but not limited to, any loss mitigation activities or transactions such as
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosures, deeds-in-lieu of foreclosure or short sales
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Seller/Servicer’s in-house quality control program
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pre- and post-funding quality control reviews are an integral part of fraud prevention and
elements.label: text

elements.text: detection in the mortgage process. In the event populations of loans are identified that have a
elements.label: text

elements.text: reason to suspect fraud, discretionary samples must be used to identify and report any
elements.label: text

elements.text: additional instances of suspected fraud.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must comply with all other Guide provisions relating to quality control
elements.label: text

elements.text: reviews, including Section 3402.2(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must periodically (at least annually) update its quality control policies
elements.label: text

elements.text: and procedures to address emerging fraud scenarios.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Additional fraud mitigation resources
elements.label: text

elements.text: Information on preventing, detecting and investigating potential fraud and other suspicious
elements.label: text

elements.text: activity is available on Freddie Mac’s website at https://sf.freddiemac.com/working-with￾us/fraud-prevention/overview.
elements.label: text

elements.text: For additional information, consult the Freddie Mac fraud hotline at 800-4FRAUD8 (800-
elements.label: text

elements.text: 437-2838) or the Freddie Mac Exclusionary List, which is accessible via Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: Gateway®.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3201.2: Fraud and other Suspicious Activity reporting
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: requirements (05/06/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Procedures for detecting, identifying and reporting fraud, suspected fraud and Suspicious
elements.label: text

elements.text: Activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Requirement to report fraud, suspected fraud and Suspicious Activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Required reporting timelines
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Use of the Tip Referral Tool
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Fraud types and trends
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must take measures to ensure that Mortgages sold to, or serviced for, Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac are free from any fraud, suspected fraud, Suspicious Activity, potential Suspicious Activity,
elements.label: text

elements.text: misrepresentation, misstatement or omission, and the Seller/Servicer must report impacted
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage(s) in accordance with the requirements outlined in this section.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages involving any misstatement, misrepresentation or omission by the Borrower or any
elements.label: text

elements.text: other party in the Mortgage and/or real estate transaction are not eligible for sale to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Procedures for detecting, identifying and reporting fraud, suspected fraud and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Suspicious Activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must have a documented program with procedures for detecting,
elements.label: text

elements.text: identifying and reporting fraud, suspected fraud and other Suspicious Activity in connection
elements.label: text

elements.text: with a Mortgage sold to, or serviced for, Freddie Mac and discovered at any time, including,
elements.label: text

elements.text: but not limited to, during origination, quality control reviews, Servicing activities or loss
elements.label: text

elements.text: mitigation efforts.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Before reporting to Freddie Mac, a Seller/Servicer must perform due diligence to establish
elements.label: text

elements.text: whether there is a reasonable basis to believe that fraud, suspected fraud or Suspicious
elements.label: text

elements.text: Activity may have occurred.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Requirement to report fraud, suspected fraud and Suspicious Activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must report to Freddie Mac when the Seller/Servicer has a reasonable
elements.label: text

elements.text: belief that one of the following is occurring or has occurred during the origination, sale or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing of a Mortgage (including, but not limited to, any loss mitigation activity) regardless
elements.label: text

elements.text: of whether (i) it had an impact on the eligibility of the Mortgage for sale to Freddie Mac or
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) there was a breach of the Guide:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any misrepresentation, misstatement or omission related to the Mortgage, the Borrower,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgaged Premises or underlying real estate transaction
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Involvement of a person or entity on the Freddie Mac Exclusionary List is involved or
elements.label: text

elements.text: was involved in the origination, sale or Servicing of the Mortgage or the underlying real
elements.label: text

elements.text: estate transaction in violation of Section 3101.1. (Note: For reporting the discovery of
elements.label: text

elements.text: any possible breach of warranties regarding the Exclusionary List, refer to instructions in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 3101.1(c)(i).)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Involvement of a person or entity on the FHFA Suspended Counterparty Program list in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the origination, sale or Servicing of the Mortgage or the related real estate transactions in
elements.label: text

elements.text: violation of Section 3101.2
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Termination or denial of mortgage insurance based on fraud
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Required reporting timelines
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must report any reportable activity as defined in Section 3201.2(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: through Freddie Mac’s Tip Referral Tool, accessible via Freddie Mac Gateway, within the
elements.label: text

elements.text: time frames outlined in the table below.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Required reporting timelines
elements.label: text

elements.text: Required time frame
elements.label: text

elements.text: for reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: Discovery of reportable activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: Within 30 days ■ Reportable activity discovered during a quality control
elements.label: text

elements.text: review: The Seller/Servicer must notify Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac within 30 days after the date the quality control results
elements.label: text

elements.text: are reported in writing to the Seller/Servicer’s Senior
elements.label: text

elements.text: Management, in accordance with the reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements in Section 3402.3(b)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reportable activity discovered through any means other
elements.label: text

elements.text: than a quality control review: The Seller/Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must notify Freddie Mac within 30 days after discovery
elements.label: text

elements.text: Immediate (within
elements.label: text

elements.text: one Business Day)
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to the above 30-day reporting requirements, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicer must notify Freddie Mac within one Business
elements.label: text

elements.text: Day after:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Becoming aware of theft of custodial funds, lack of
elements.label: text

elements.text: collateral, non-remittance of pay-off funds or multiple
elements.label: text

elements.text: deliveries of the same Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Determining there is a substantial likelihood that the fraud,
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspected fraud or other Suspicious Activity will receive

elements.text: significant public exposure or publicity
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Receiving notification of the entry of a civil judgment,
elements.label: text

elements.text: guilty plea or criminal conviction indicating lack of
elements.label: text

elements.text: integrity and relating to a participant in a Mortgage or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: underlying real estate transaction or relating to a board
elements.label: text

elements.text: member, officer, employee or contractor of the

elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Receiving notification from law enforcement or another

elements.text: governmental authority that such authority is conducting

elements.text: an investigation or prosecution of fraud relating to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages owned by, or serviced for, Freddie Mac or
elements.label: text

elements.text: relating to a board member, officer, employee or contractor
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the Seller/Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Identifying a possible fraud scheme or pattern of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Suspicious Activity involving (i) more than five Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: sold to, or serviced for, Freddie Mac or (ii) Mortgages sold

elements.label: text

elements.label: text

elements.text: for reporting
