elements.label: text

elements.text: to, or serviced for, Freddie Mac with an aggregate UPB of
elements.label: text

elements.text: at least $1 million
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Identifying actual or possible terrorist financing or ongoing
elements.label: text

elements.text: or possible money laundering schemes or activity
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers are not required to, and must not, disclose to Freddie Mac any Financial
elements.label: text

elements.text: Crimes Enforcement Network Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) or draft SARs, documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: or information revealing the existence of a SAR or indicating whether a SAR has been filed,
elements.label: text

elements.text: or where disclosure of Suspicious Activity would otherwise be prohibited by law.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Use of the Tip Referral Tool
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must report all Mortgage fraud, suspected Mortgage fraud and other
elements.label: text

elements.text: Suspicious Activity using the Tip Referral Tool. Referrals made through the Tip Referral
elements.label: text

elements.text: Tool must include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac loan number
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Property address
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgage fraud/Suspicious Activity type and category
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Parties involved
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Supporting documentation
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A detailed narrative description of the activity, including why it has been deemed
elements.label: text

elements.text: suspicious or fraudulent. (Seller/Servicers should not include protected personal
elements.label: text

elements.text: information, such as Social Security numbers, in the narrative description.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any other required information as identified in the Tip Referral Tool
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Fraud types and trends
elements.label: text

elements.text: In connection with the Seller/Servicer’s fraud tracking procedures required in Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3201.3(b), the Seller/Servicer must maintain and, upon request, provide Freddie Mac with
elements.label: text

elements.text: aggregated records and reporting detailing fraud types and trends, including the number of
elements.label: text

elements.text: fraud cases and positive Exclusionary List hits.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3201.3: Fraud cooperation and additional
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: requirements (06/10/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Fraud cooperation
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Additional fraud
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Fraud cooperation
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must cooperate with Freddie Mac to prevent and investigate fraud and
elements.label: text

elements.text: other Suspicious Activity. Cooperation includes making available to Freddie Mac individuals
elements.label: text

elements.text: with relevant knowledge and providing to Freddie Mac and, when permitted by law, assisting
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac in obtaining all information, documentation and records requested by Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac relating to a Mortgage and related real estate transactions, including, but not limited to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Closing or settlement agent files
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgage files
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Borrower payment records
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reverifications of employment, income, occupancy and assets
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any internal or external communications
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must provide all information requested by Freddie Mac through the Tip
elements.label: text

elements.text: Referral Tool within 14 days after receiving the request, using the Tip Referral Tool.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Additional fraud
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers are reminded of their continuing obligation to comply with all applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: federal, State and local laws, including those relating to fraud and anti-money laundering (see
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1301.2).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must have in place written procedures for preventing, detecting and reporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: fraud, and detecting and reporting Suspicious Activity, including the requirements of this
elements.label: text

elements.text: chapter, and must make these procedures available to Freddie Mac upon request.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Seller/Servicers must implement fraud risk management processes and controls, which may
elements.label: text

elements.text: include screening software/tools and monitoring. Procedures must be in place to identify and
elements.label: text

elements.text: track fraud trends, volume of potential fraud (such as number of fraud incidents and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Exclusionary List hits) and Suspicious Activity and fraud alert review and resolution.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 3301: Mortgage File Contents
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 3301.1: Mortgage file (11/19/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Additional documentation to be retained in Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller (if it services the Mortgage for Freddie Mac) and any Transferee Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: maintain the Mortgage file in accordance with Chapter 3302 for so long as each services the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage for Freddie Mac. The Mortgage file must contain all applicable documents listed in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 3401 and in this chapter.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sellers that sell Mortgages under the Servicing-Released Sales Process must comply with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage file and related data retention requirements set forth in Exhibit 28A, Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing Purchase and Sale Agreement for Cash-Released XChange®.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Except with respect to Mortgages sold under the Servicing-Released Sales Process as set
elements.label: text

elements.text: forth above, for convenience with Transfers of Servicing, the Transferor Servicer may
elements.label: text

elements.text: maintain copies of the Mortgage file content.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sellers and Transferor Servicers that retain copies of any or all of the Mortgage file must do
elements.label: text

elements.text: so until the later of:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seven years after all associated representation and warranty obligations expire as set forth
elements.label: text

elements.text: in Loan Coverage Advisor®
elements.label: text

elements.text: , or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Seven years after any Transfer of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Mortgage file, its contents and any copies (and all associated data and information,
elements.label: text

elements.text: whether stored electronically or otherwise) are and remain at all times the property of Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac. See Section 1201.9 for additional information regarding Freddie Mac’s ownership of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgage file, Mortgage data and related records in the possession of a Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller may redact or delete the Borrower’s Social Security number from all documents in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Mortgage file, provided that the Seller:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivers to Freddie Mac a complete Social Security number for each Borrower as
elements.label: text

elements.text: required in Section 6302.9,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delivers unredacted documents to Freddie Mac whenever the Mortgage file is submitted
elements.label: text

elements.text: to Freddie Mac for quality control review in accordance with Section 3401.1(a),
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Maintains the Borrower’s Social Security number in its electronic files as part of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage file, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Provides the Servicing Transferee with the Borrower’s Social Security number in
elements.label: text

elements.text: connection with any Transfer of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Additional documentation to be retained in Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Seller/Servicer must retain in the Mortgage file all other Mortgage-related documents,
elements.label: text

elements.text: including, but not limited to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any documents required under the Guide or other Purchase Documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any documentation requested by Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any documentation commonly maintained in files of private institutional mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: investors or servicers
elements.label: text

elements.text: For each Mortgage secured by a Condominium Unit or a unit in a Planned Unit Development
elements.label: text

elements.text: (PUD), or, for each Cooperative Share Loan, the Seller/Servicer must retain additional
elements.label: text

elements.text: documentation required by Freddie Mac (e.g., for a Mortgage secured by a Condominium
elements.label: text

elements.text: Unit, the declaration of condominium, bylaws and regulations). The Seller/Servicer agrees to
elements.label: text

elements.text: deliver the documentation at its own expense to Freddie Mac when requested.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Unless specifically required by the Seller’s Purchase Documents, the documentation
elements.label: text

elements.text: pertaining to a project does not need to be maintained in a Mortgage file (e.g., see Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: 5705.11(c) for Cooperative Share Loans).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Taxpayer First Act requires that the taxpayer’s consent be obtained prior to any
elements.label: text

elements.text: disclosure of the taxpayer’s tax return or tax return information to a third party. If consent is
elements.label: text

elements.text: required under the Act, the signed consent form must be:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Obtained in a timely manner, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Placed in the Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additionally, the Servicer must retain a copy of the signed consent form in the Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: for each Mortgage for which a Servicer obtains tax return information on or after December
elements.label: text

elements.text: 28, 2019 as part of its Servicing activity for a Mortgage owned or securitized by Freddie
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3301.2: Legal instruments (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Security Instrument
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ New York Consolidation, Extension and Modification Agreement (NY CEMA)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assignment instrument
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Power of attorney
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Security Instrument
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Security Instruments that were recorded in paper format, the Mortgage file must contain
elements.label: text

elements.text: either:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The original paper Security Instrument with recordation notation, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A paper or Electronic (as defined in Section 1401.1(b)) copy of the Security Instrument,
elements.label: text

elements.text: with:
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Recordation notation on the copy of the Security Instrument, or
elements.label: text

elements.text:  Recordation notation in a separate document maintained with such copy
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Seller/Servicer maintains an Electronic copy of the Security Instrument (as noted
elements.label: text

elements.text: above), it must comply with the requirements set forth in Section 3302.1(b)(ii).
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Security Instrument was electronically recorded, the Seller/Servicer must comply with
elements.label: text

elements.text: the requirements set forth in Sections 1401.3(d) and 1401.3(e) related to Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: Recording of paper Closing Documents and Electronic Recording of Electronic Closing
elements.label: text

elements.text: Documents, respectively.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: If the Mortgage is secured by a Manufactured Home, see Sections 5703.4(b) and
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) NY CEMA
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Mortgages secured by property in New York State that are documented using an NY
elements.label: text

elements.text: CEMA, the Mortgage file must contain the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A copy of the Consolidated Note showing all endorsements
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Unless Original Notes are required by Section 3401.2(a), copies of the Original Old
elements.label: text

elements.text: Money Note and any Original New Money (Gap) Notes
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Original NY CEMA, with recordation notation. Where recorders keep the original
elements.label: text

elements.text: documents, a copy certified by the recorder will suffice.
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Mortgages secured by property in New York State that are documented using an NY
elements.label: text

elements.text: CEMA Form 3172, 1/01 or Form 3172, 1/01 (rev. 5/01), the Mortgage file must contain the
elements.label: text

elements.text: following additional documents:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the most recent prior Mortgage was originated as a consolidated Mortgage using NY
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The prior NY CEMA with all exhibits attached from the prior consolidation,
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The prior original Consolidated Note from the prior Consolidation,
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The Original Old Money Note, and
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The Original New Money (Gap) Note
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the most recent prior Mortgage was originated as a consolidated Mortgage using the
elements.label: text

elements.text: NY CEMA Form 3172 7/86:
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The Original Old Money Note,
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The NY CEMA with all exhibits attached from the prior Consolidation, and
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The Original New Money (Gap) Note
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the most recent prior Mortgage was not originated using an NY CEMA Form 3172,
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1/01, Form 3172, 1/01 (rev. 5/01), or Form 3172 7/86 (i.e., the most recent prior
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage was not a consolidated Mortgage):
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The Original Old Money Note, and
elements.label: text

elements.text:  The Original New Money (Gap) Note
elements.label: text

elements.text: If new funds were advanced to the Borrower at the time of the current consolidation, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Original Old Money Note and Original New Money (Gap) Note, if applicable, must be
elements.label: text

elements.text: original Notes signed by the Borrower and endorsed in blank.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Assignment instrument
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Intervening Assignments must be sent to and held by the Document Custodian unless the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage is registered with MERS® and the Seller/Servicer has elected to retain all
elements.label: text

elements.text: assignments for MERS-registered Mortgages in the Mortgage files. The Seller/Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: supply its Document Custodian with documents indicating that the Seller/Servicer has
elements.label: text

elements.text: elected to hold all assignments in the Mortgage files.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See Section 6301.4(a) for additional information on completion of delivery.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Power of attorney
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Note was executed by a person acting as attorney-in-fact pursuant to authority granted
elements.label: text

elements.text: by a Borrower under a power of attorney, except for eMortgages, the copy of the power of
elements.label: text

elements.text: attorney must be attached to the copy of the Note kept in the file.
elements.label: text

elements.text: See Section 6301.2(b) for documentation delivery requirements for powers of attorney and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 1402.3(a) for eMortgage delivery requirements.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3301.3: Plat of survey (11/19/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Plat of survey
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Property insurance policies
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assurance of water supply
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgage insurance policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Leasehold estate
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Plat of survey
elements.label: text

elements.text: The file must contain a plat of survey if required by the title company insuring the Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: or the attorney rendering the opinion of title. See Section 4702.2(e) for details.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Property insurance policies
elements.label: text

elements.text: The file must contain property insurance policies, properly endorsed, or suitable evidence of
elements.label: text

elements.text: insurance as described in Section 8202.4 unless the Seller/Servicer carries mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: impairment insurance instead of maintaining possession of property insurance policies.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Assurance of water supply
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Mortgaged Premises is dependent for assurance of an adequate supply of water on a
elements.label: text

elements.text: water or irrigation company that supplies water only to its shareholders, the file must contain
elements.label: text

elements.text: a stock certificate, duly endorsed to Freddie Mac, entitling the property owner to an adequate
elements.label: text

elements.text: supply of water.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Mortgage insurance policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Mortgage is required to be insured, the file must contain the mortgage insurance policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: or proof of insurance.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Leasehold estate
elements.label: text

elements.text: Documents affecting the leasehold estate, if any, securing the indebtedness must be included
elements.label: text

elements.text: in the file. This includes an original executed or certified copy of the lease containing the
elements.label: text

elements.text: recordation location.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 3302: Mortgage File Retention
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: 3302.1: Mortgage file management (12/17/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Maintaining Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Form of Mortgage file documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Mortgage file control and identification
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Maintaining Mortgage file
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must maintain an individual file for each Mortgage serviced for Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The file must include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ All documents required to be held by the Seller, as outlined in Chapter 3301
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ All legal notices, correspondence, forms and reports concerning the Mortgage and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgaged Premises or REO
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must also maintain adequate records of collection efforts and make the records
elements.label: text

elements.text: available for Freddie Mac’s inspection on request. At a minimum, the records must show:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Dates that the letters and notices were mailed
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Dates and results of all collection activities with Borrowers
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reasons for prior and current defaults
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Terms of any arrangements for curing the Delinquency and/or providing alternatives to
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Documentation of property inspections, as required in Section 9202.3(b)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Form of Mortgage file documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Paper originals
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must maintain the paper original of each of the following documents:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Certificate of title, with the lien properly noted, if the Mortgage is secured by a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Manufactured Home in a certificate of title State where there is no procedure for
elements.label: text

elements.text: canceling the certificate of title.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: In jurisdictions where applicable law requires the owner of the Manufactured
elements.label: text

elements.text: Home to retain the original certificate of title, the Servicer may maintain a copy of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: original certificate of title. Refer to Section 5703.4(f)(iii).
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Recorded assignment of the Mortgage to MERS®, if applicable, and any Intervening
elements.label: text

elements.text: Assignments, if the Servicer has elected to retain the assignments for MERS￾registered Mortgages, unless electronically recorded in accordance with Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For Mortgages documented using a New York Consolidation, Extension and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Modification Agreement (NY CEMA):
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Original Old Money Notes
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Original New Money Notes (Gap Notes) and, if applicable,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Original Consolidated Notes from prior consolidations as required by Sections
elements.label: text

elements.text: The above documents and the Mortgage file must be kept in a fire-resistant storage area.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac may, at any time, require that, at the Servicer’s expense, the Servicer or the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Document Custodian affix the Freddie Mac loan number to the face of each Note.
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to maintaining the paper original of the documents above, the Servicer should
elements.label: text

elements.text: maintain back-up paper or Electronic (as defined in Section 1401.1(b)) copies of such
elements.label: text

elements.text: original paper documents in the Mortgage file.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Security Instruments
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Mortgage file must contain the Security Instrument in accordance with Section
elements.label: text

elements.text: When stored as paper documents, such Security Instruments must be stored and
elements.label: text

elements.text: maintained in the same manner as the original paper documents in Section 3302.1(b)(i)
elements.label: text

elements.text: above.
elements.label: text

elements.text: When such Security Instruments are stored as Electronic Mortgage file documents, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Promptly obtain, at the Servicer’s expense, certified paper or Electronic copies from
elements.label: text

elements.text: the recorder’s office of any recorded Security Instrument whenever:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Necessary for the Servicing of such Mortgages, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Required by Freddie Mac, in its sole discretion
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Such requests would ordinarily be on a case-by-case basis unless Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: requires the Servicer to obtain certified copies of all such recorded Security
elements.label: text

elements.text: Instruments to protect Freddie Mac’s interests and enforce its rights.
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Notify any prospective Transferee Servicer that certain Mortgages have Electronic
elements.label: text

elements.text: copies of the Security Instruments that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Are stored electronically in the Servicer’s Electronic storage System (as defined
elements.label: text

elements.text: in Section 1401.1(b)) for Mortgage file documents (“eStorage System”), and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Would be electronically transferred to the Transferee Servicer’s eStorage System,
elements.label: text

elements.text: if applicable, as part of any Transfer of Servicing, subject to the requirements in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 7101.5(a)(1) under which the Transferor Servicer may be required to
elements.label: text

elements.text: convert the documents and records to the form of storage used by the Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer or generate paper copies of all documents and records for the Transferee
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Represent and warrant to, and covenant with, Freddie Mac that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Electronic storage of Electronic copies of the Security Instruments will not in
elements.label: text

elements.text: any way adversely affect the validity, enforceability or effectiveness of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Security Instruments,
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Electronic copies of the Security Instruments comply with all applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: laws, including, without limitation, E-SIGN and the UETA, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ All Security Instruments that have been recorded have:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Created valid First Liens on the related Mortgaged Premises, and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Been copied as Electronic Records and the Servicer has securely stored,
elements.label: text

elements.text: protected and maintained such Electronic Records, showing recordation
elements.label: text

elements.text: information, in the Servicer’s eStorage System
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Indemnify and hold Freddie Mac harmless from any delay in enforcement of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages and any failure or inability to collect amounts due under any Mortgage, in
elements.label: text

elements.text: addition to any costs, loss, damages, expenses, legal fees or any costs of any kind that
elements.label: text

elements.text: arise out of or occur in connection with or as a result of the Servicer’s decision to not
elements.label: text

elements.text: store the original recorded Security Instruments as paper Mortgage file documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Secure and protect all Electronic copies of the Security Instruments with recordation
elements.label: text

elements.text: information or Recording Confirmation(s) (as defined in Section 1401.3(d)) with
elements.label: text

elements.text: recording information in the Servicer’s eStorage System and maintain the validity,
elements.label: text

elements.text: effectiveness and enforceability of such Electronic Mortgage file documents for the
elements.label: text

elements.text: life of each Mortgage plus seven years
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the original Security Instrument was electronically recorded, the Seller/Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: comply with the requirements set forth in Sections 1401.3(d) and 1401.3(e) related to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Recording of paper Closing Documents and Electronic Recording of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Electronic Closing Documents, respectively.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the copies of the recorded Security Instruments are Electronic Records, the Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must also maintain copies (paper or Electronic) of the original recorded Security
elements.label: text

elements.text: Instruments in the Mortgage file at a storage area that is geographically remote from and
elements.label: text

elements.text: not susceptible to the same disasters as the primary storage facility site.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (iii) Reproductions of original paper documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: Except for the documents noted above, which must be maintained as paper originals or in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the same manner as paper originals, the Servicer may maintain paper or Electronic copies
elements.label: text

elements.text: of Mortgage file documents reproduced from the original paper documents by any
elements.label: text

elements.text: photographic, photostatic, microfilm, microfiche, electronic imaging, optical disk or laser
elements.label: text

elements.text: disk storage process; provided that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The copies are allowed under laws or regulations to which the Servicer is subject and
elements.label: text

elements.text: in the jurisdiction where the Mortgaged Premises is located
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Servicer has a written opinion of its counsel that the copies are admissible
elements.label: text

elements.text: evidence in court
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The copies were made in the regular course of business pursuant to a written policy of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer applicable to all of its Mortgage files
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The copies were made by a process that accurately reproduces or forms a durable
elements.label: text

elements.text: medium for reproducing the originals
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the Servicer maintains Electronic copies of such paper Mortgage file documents,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer stores such Electronic copies in a manner that preserves (i) the view
elements.label: text

elements.text: (visual computer screen image or printed paper image) of such Electronic documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: and (ii) any data contained in or associated with the Electronic document for the life
elements.label: text

elements.text: of each associated Mortgage plus seven years
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Servicer maintains Systems, as defined in Section 1401.1(b), on the premises
elements.label: text

elements.text: where the copies are kept that permit the viewing or reading of the copies and the
elements.label: text

elements.text: reproduction of such copies into legible paper copies.
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must make such Systems available for use by Freddie Mac’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: representatives as needed.
elements.label: text
